C2-FM-01: separate counted and uncounted objects physically
slow the count while matching each word to one object
C2-FM-02: add visual markers to support place-keeping
C2-FM-03: practice with lined-up circular and scattered sets
ask what stays the same when layout changes
use the same quantity in multiple layouts
C2-FM-04: ask the learner to explain why each object gets one count
compare correct and incorrect counting demonstrations
use sentence frames for the one-count-per-object rule
